case_title: INVINCIBLE RECORDS AND FILMS INC. VS. PLANET OUT INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JAN-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PLANET OUT INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS INC. (PLANET OUT INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS USA INC.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,454.00 FILED BY INVINCIBLE RECORDS AND FILMS INC. (INVINCIBLE RECORDS AND FILMS INC./VIRGINIA WILLIAMS) AS TO DEFENDANT PLANET OUT INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS INC. (PLANET OUT INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS INC. AKA PLANET OUT PARTNERS USA INC.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-16-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF FAXED A COPY OF CHECK PAYMENT FROM THE DEFENDANT AND INDICATED ON THE FAX COPY THAT THE CHECKED CLEARED THE BANK. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
